name: GPX Account Api
description:
All calls to the Logistimatics HTTPS API require an Authorization header with an API key.

As a rule, all dates are ISO8601 strings. Please note that depending on your HTTP client you may need to URL-encode these strings as they contain colons (`:`). All calls to devices can be made via the device's respective `id` field.
